programme.title: Today Extra
programme.desc: Join the TODAY EXTRA team for an exciting mix of topical issues, the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, LIVE music performances, the latest in fashion and beauty trends.

programme.title: 9News Morning
programme.desc: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.

programme.title: Our Take On Love
programme.desc: When unlucky-in-love Isabella and filmmaker Blake find themselves planning a huge celebration in a mansion, neither knew what they'd find. They unexpectedly find a love and adventure they never knew could be true.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong. In each episode four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct but obscure answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Hosted by Ben Shepherd, three players are pit against a mesmerising machine. There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine.

programme.title: 9News Afternoon
programme.desc: Hosted by Monika Kos, this live one-hour state-wide bulletin brings viewers up-to-date with the news and debates of the day with a mix of live reports and expert chats. Your Perth, Your News.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Tipping Point Australia will push contestants' luck to the very edge. Three contestants will go head to head against the mesmerising machine with one lucky contestant playing for the Jackpot. Hosted by Todd Woodbridge.

programme.title: 9News
programme.desc: Join 9News for the latest in news and events that affect you in your local city, as well as news from across Australia and the world.

programme.title: A Current Affair
programme.desc: A Current Affair covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities and entertainment - all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: Live: NRL Thursday Night Footy
programme.desc: Wide World of Sports presents Thursday Night footy with Dolphins v Bulldogs, live from Suncorp Stadium. Join our expert commentary team for all the action, analysis and post match interviews. Kick off at 7:50PM AEST.

programme.title: Live: NRL Thursday Night Footy Post-Match
programme.desc: Join the Wide World of Sports team for all the post-match NRL news and analysis.

programme.title: 9News Late
programme.desc: Join the 9News Late team for all of today's top stories from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: The Night Caller
programme.desc: Tony and Lawrence get into a fight and Tony discovers a secret. DS Marshall begins to close in.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Hosted by Ben Shepherd, three players are pit against a mesmerising machine. There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine.

programme.title: Reel Destinations
programme.desc: Join Dyllon Schulz and the Reel Destinations crew on an epic fishing adventure as they catch and cook their way around Queensland.

programme.title: Skippy - The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: Sonny and his kangaroo Skippy live in Waratah National Park in New South Wales. Matt Hammond, Sonny's father is the park ranger. Skippy saves the day in many adventures.

programme.title: A Current Affair
programme.desc: A Current Affair covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities and entertainment - all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: Today Early News
programme.desc: Today Early News with up to date news from Australia and around the world as well as the latest in sport and weather.

programme.title: Today
programme.desc: Join Karl Stefanovic and Sarah Abo and the TODAY team as they bring you the latest in news, current affairs, sports, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.

programme.title: Today
programme.desc: Join Karl Stefanovic and Sarah Abo and the TODAY team as they bring you the latest in news, current affairs, sports, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.

programme.title: Today Extra
programme.desc: Join the TODAY EXTRA team for an exciting mix of topical issues, the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, LIVE music performances, the latest in fashion and beauty trends.

programme.title: 9News Morning
programme.desc: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.

programme.title: To England, With Love
programme.desc: As far as Ali's concerned, she has it all. Until a mysterious quest sends her from Los Angeles to England on a treasure hunt through history and she finds herself opening up to old and new loves all over again.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong. In each episode four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct but obscure answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Contestants play a large coin-drop machine, provided they answer questions correctly. Answer incorrectly and the players could be eliminated. The last contestant standing has an opportunity to win the machine's £10,000 jackpot.

programme.title: 9News Afternoon
programme.desc: Hosted by Monika Kos, this live one-hour state-wide bulletin brings viewers up-to-date with the news and debates of the day with a mix of live reports and expert chats. Your Perth, Your News.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend, Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point Australia will push contestants' luck to the very edge. Three contestants will go head to head against the mesmerising machine with one lucky contestant playing for the Jackpot.

programme.title: 9News
programme.desc: Join 9News for the latest in news and events that affect you in your local city, as well as news from across Australia and the world.

programme.title: A Current Affair
programme.desc: A Current Affair covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities and entertainment - all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: NRL Friday Night Footy
programme.desc: Wide World of Sports presents Friday Night footy with Cowboys v Eels, live from QLD Country Bank Stadium. Join our expert commentary team for all the action, analysis and post match interviews. Kick off at 8:00PM AEST.

programme.title: Live: NRL Friday Night Footy Post-Match
programme.desc: Join the Wide World of Sports team for the all the post-match NRL news and analysis.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: Een vader krijgt een zware klap te verduren wanneer zijn tienerzoon dertig jaar de gevangenis indraait voor het handelen in drugs. De vader gaat undercover als drugsdealer om de straf van zijn zoon omlaag te krijgen. Ondertussen denkt een advocate dat het oppakken van een drugsbende haar kan helpen bij een politieke carrière.

programme.title: Explore TV-Viking
programme.desc: On the final episode of Trev's Grand European journey, he makes his way through Germany taking in the rich art and history. The Viking Tir then takes Trev to the Netherlands, where he explores Kinderdijk and ends his journey in Amsterdam.

programme.desc: Home shopping programme.

programme.title: Skippy - The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: An elderly ornithologist is determined to prevent a group of young water skiers from using the river and scaring off the birds he is recording the sounds of.

programme.title: Global Shop
programme.desc: Home shopping programme.

programme.title: TV Shop - Home Shopping
programme.desc: Home shopping programme.

programme.title: Postcards
programme.desc: Madeline is in Heidelberg at the sculpture museum. Kris visits the world's largest scrap metal art gallery in Port Melbourne. Shane heads to Kilmore to learn the art of salami-making. And Livinia explores the new and the old on Maling Road.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: This week on Getaway; a kids guide to Canberra, exploring the creative side of the Sri Lankan city of Colombo plus a Margaret River foodie tour.

programme.title: A Current Affair
programme.desc: A Current Affair covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities and entertainment - all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: Weekend Today
programme.desc: Join the Weekend Today team as they bring you the latest in news, sport, weather, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.

programme.title: Today Extra - Saturday
programme.desc: Join the team for the best of TODAY EXTRA – an exciting mix of highlights from the week in review. Includes the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, the latest in fashion & more.

programme.title: Open For Inspection
programme.desc: Creative transformations turning unexpected spaces into unique and highly liveable homes.

programme.title: Great Australian Detour
programme.desc: Andrew Daddo uncovers Hotham's hidden treasures in the 2024 Subaru Crosstrek AWD 2.0S. From an overnight nature experience to husky sled dog tours, Hotham's charm extends far beyond the slopes.

programme.title: Explore TV-Viking
programme.desc: Trevor Cochrane cruises aboard the award winning Viking Sea small cruise ship. It's a fascinating insight into life aboard the ship whilst visiting Norway, Scotland and England discovering the Viking history along the journey.

programme.title: Adelaide Equestrian Festival
programme.desc: The Adelaide Equestrian Festival is home of the only 5-star International Horse Trials in the Southern Hemisphere, held in the heart of the Adelaide City.
